message:
fix: Replace @panic with return error in unittest assertions

Convert all unittest assertion functions from using @panic to
returning error.AssertionFailed for test failures. This makes
assertion failures catchable by the test framework instead of
crashing the entire test process.

Changes:
- Update function signatures from void to !void for all assertions
- Replace @panic calls with return error.AssertionFailed
- Fix format_spec.zig underscore grouping in exponent part
- Fix OperatorPow to use pyFloatMod for Python semantics
